title: The Hollow Clock
scene: A grandfather clock stands alone in a flooded ballroom, its hands melted into spirals. From the bell tower above, moths pour outward like smoke. The floor reflects a sky that does not exist overhead.

title: The Silver Needle
scene: A single needle floats point-down in a glass of still water, touching nothing, casting a shadow far longer than it should. The thread attached is the colour of old wounds.

title: Roots That Weep
scene: A staircase descends into earth while roots press through the walls, dripping something dark and slow. At the bottom, a door is outlined in pale green light.

title: The Drowned Lantern
scene: A lantern sways in perfectly still water twenty feet below the surface. Its flame still burns. Fish circle it but never approach.

title: Mirrors at Midnight
scene: A corridor of mirrors in which every reflection is slightly delayed. In the last mirror, someone stands behind the viewer who is not there when you turn.

title: The Moth Conference
scene: Hundreds of moths cover every surface of a room, wings beating slowly in perfect unison. At the centre, a chair faces a window painted shut.

title: The Surgeon's Garden
scene: A garden laid out in the precise geometry of a human body. The iron gate locks from outside only. The roses have no thorns but leave wounds.

title: Portrait in Smoke
scene: A portrait in which the subject's face shifts each time you blink. The frame is locked to the wall. The plaque beneath reads: STILL WATCHING.

title: The Salted Shore
scene: A beach where the sand has crystallised into salt columns. The tide has not moved in years. The horizon is missing.

title: The Archive Room
scene: Shelves of identical black books stretch up past the ceiling lights. A ladder leans against a shelf no one alive has climbed. One book lies open on the floor.

title: Ink Tide
scene: A rising tide of black ink floods a room with no exits. Floating on its surface: letters in many languages, all saying the same word.

title: The Locked Garden Gate
scene: Ornate iron gate covered in climbing roses, the lock shaped like an eye. Beyond it, the garden holds a figure who has always been there.

title: The Painting That Blinks
scene: An oil painting of a window. When no one looks directly at it, the painted curtains move. The window in the painting shows a different sky.

title: The Copper Distillery
scene: Giant copper vats connected by miles of pipe in a room that sweats condensation. The smell is of something medicinal and sweet. The floor is stained many colours.

title: The Night Market
scene: A market open only between three and four in the morning, selling things you did not know you needed. All sellers face away from their stalls.

title: The Wax Cathedral
scene: A cathedral built entirely of candles, slowly melting inward. The heat is immense. The pews are filled with figures made of tallow.

title: Glass Birds
scene: A flock of glass birds mid-flight, frozen in the air above a field. When the wind blows, they ring like bells but never fall.

title: The Ink-Stained Study
scene: A desk covered in decades of ink, the stains forming a map of a place that doesn't exist. A single candle burns at the centre, illuminating the key.

title: The Rope Bridge
scene: A bridge of fraying rope over a gorge filled with fog. The planks are engraved with names. One is freshly carved.

title: The Crystal Cellar
scene: Underground chambers where the walls are pure crystal, refracting light from a source no one can locate. Everything has a shadow in six directions.

title: The Sleeping Botanist
scene: A figure asleep in a greenhouse chair, covered entirely in ivy. The plants breathe in and out with the sleeper. A notebook rests open on their chest.

title: The Iron Key
scene: An oversized iron key hanging from a hook in an otherwise empty room. The shadow it casts shows a door that isn't there.

title: The Tidal Room
scene: A room where the floor is sea water, rising and falling every hour. Furniture floats. A chandelier hangs just above the high-tide mark.

title: The Portrait Corridor
scene: Every portrait in the long gallery has been turned to face the wall. The frames leave pale rectangles on the wallpaper where light never reached.

title: The Apothecary Shelf
scene: Hundreds of vials of different colours, neatly labelled in a hand too small to read without a lens. One is missing from the middle of the third shelf.

title: The Fog Bell
scene: A brass bell on a wooden post at the edge of a cliff. It rings in fog that contains no wind. Ships below alter course.

title: The Amber Room
scene: A room where everything is encased in amber: a fly, a candle, a handprint, a scream. The temperature has been exactly the same for a hundred years.

title: The Cartographer's Table
scene: An enormous map covers the entire floor, pinned at the corners by objects that don't belong: a tooth, a coin, a ring, a seed.

title: Staircase to the Waterline
scene: A grand staircase whose lower half is submerged. The bannister is covered in barnacles. A portrait at the landing looks down at its own reflection.

title: The Dormant Furnace
scene: A furnace large enough to walk into, cold now for decades, its interior covered in hand-shaped soot marks reaching upward toward the flue.

title: The Gloved Hand
scene: A single white glove on a table, palm-down, fingers spread as if pressing. No crease suggests a hand has ever been inside it.

title: The Tide of Black Flowers
scene: A tide of black flowers pushing through the floor of a ballroom, splitting the marble, filling the space with a scent of earth and something older.

title: The Locked Suitcase
scene: A leather suitcase on a luggage rack, triple-locked, vibrating very slightly. The label says it arrived yesterday. The owner has not.

title: The Frozen Lake
scene: A lake frozen solid in midsummer. Beneath the ice, caught in perfect clarity: a hand reaching upward, fingers spread.

title: The Clock Hand
scene: A single clock hand, five feet long, resting against a wall. No clock is attached. It still moves, ticking forward at the correct rate.

title: The Hollow Tower
scene: A tower open to the sky at the top, the interior an uninterrupted void. Leaves fall in, but none accumulate at the bottom.

title: The Physician's Bag
scene: A leather bag open on a table, instruments arranged by length. One slot is empty and no instrument on the table fits it.

title: The Cartographer's Ring
scene: A ring engraved with a map of a country that was renamed before anyone alive was born. Wearing it in certain light reveals a second layer of engraving.

title: The Canvas Room
scene: A room where every wall, floor, and ceiling is a stretched canvas painted to look like more rooms extending to infinity. The window is painted open.

title: The Silent Bell Tower
scene: Bell ropes hanging, bells intact, but no sound produced. Birds nest on the bells. The tower keeps perfect time by shadow.

title: The Rope Coil
scene: A coil of rope on a dock, each loop exactly the same size. The rope is dry but the dock is soaked. It smells of the ocean and something that was alive.

title: The Poisoned Well
scene: A stone well at the centre of a dead garden. The water is perfectly clear but nothing grows within thirty feet. The bucket rope is too short to reach the surface.

title: The Taxidermied Room
scene: Every animal in the room is mounted mid-action: in flight, mid-leap, open-mouthed. They all face the same corner of the ceiling.

title: The Paper Boats
scene: Hundreds of paper boats float in a flooded hallway, each containing a single lit candle. They move against the current.

title: The Cracked Bell
scene: A bell with a crack running from lip to crown, producing two notes simultaneously when struck. The church it belongs to burned down; the bell survived.

title: The Drowned Garden
scene: A formal garden submerged under six feet of still water. The topiary is perfectly maintained. Butterflies walk on the surface above.

title: The Fingerprint Map
scene: A window pane covered in fingerprints arranged into a recognisable map. Each print is from a different person. One print is much larger than a human hand.

title: The Ink Portrait
scene: A portrait painted entirely in ink, bleeding at the edges. The subject's hands are hidden behind their back. The painting is dated six years after the subject died.

title: The Ship Chandlery
scene: A warehouse of ship's supplies, the ropes coiled, the lanterns hung in rows. The ship waiting outside is smaller than any of the goods inside.

title: The Fossil Wall
scene: A wall entirely composed of compressed fossils: plants, fish, small creatures caught in the stone. One is unmistakably human.

title: The Library Tower
scene: A spiral library ascending a lighthouse, books shelved by the year of the authors death. The top shelf is empty and the ladder smells of recent use.

title: The Seamstress's Room
scene: Needles and thread covering every surface in geometric patterns. The dress form in the corner wears something half-finished that was started long ago.

title: The Boneyard Clock
scene: A clock tower in a cemetery, its face replaced with a mirror. At midnight the reflection shows a different cemetery.

title: The Submerged Greenhouse
scene: A Victorian greenhouse at the bottom of a reservoir. The glass is intact. The plants inside are still growing.

title: The Suspended Compass
scene: A ship's compass suspended in mid-air above a stone floor, pointing northeast no matter how the room is rotated. The needle is the colour of dried blood.

title: The Walled Orchard
scene: An orchard surrounded by walls too high to see over. All the fruit is the same shade of dark red. The trees are planted in the shape of letters.

title: The Tide Table
scene: A dining table set for seven, the chairs occupied by the incoming tide. The food has not been touched. The candles burn underwater.

title: The Cabinet of Rings
scene: A display cabinet containing hundreds of rings from different centuries, each labelled with a name and a date. One label is blank and the ring still warm.

title: The Map Room Floor
scene: A floor inlaid with a mosaic map of all the world's coastlines, updated each decade. The most recent addition marks an island that appears on no other chart.

title: The Bone Chandelier
scene: A chandelier made of what appear to be coral but upon close inspection are not coral. The candles in it never need replacing.

title: The Iron Surgeon
scene: A surgical theatre with instruments laid on a table, each one a different metal. The operating lamp still shines. The table has been recently cleaned.

title: The Perfume Archive
scene: A vault containing thousands of sealed bottles, each labelled with a person's name and a year. Some of the names are famous. None of the bottles should be opened.

title: The Sundial at Three
scene: A sundial casting its shadow on three rather than the correct hour, in a garden where the sun is directly overhead. The shadow points at the door.

title: The Painter's Eye
scene: A single large eye painted on a canvas that occupies the entire end wall of a studio. Brushes, dried to stone, radiate outward from it like lashes.

title: The Crystal Pendulum
scene: A pendulum of pure crystal swings in an empty room, its arc unaffected by the temperature, by the season, by the death of the person who set it in motion.

title: The Fog Room
scene: A room where the fog is always present at knee height, concealing the floor entirely. The furniture rests on it as if on water. Footsteps leave no marks.

title: The Blackthorn Hedge
scene: A hedge of blackthorn thirty feet high, enclosing nothing visible. Birds build nests in it but abandon them before they are finished.

title: The Taxidermy Workshop
scene: A workshop where the finished animals on the shelves watch the unfinished ones on the table. Tools arranged by frequency of use. The sawdust smells of copper.

title: The Sealed Port
scene: A harbour where every vessel has been chained to the dock with chains too strong to have been made here. The ships have not moved in generations.

title: The Watcher's Tower
scene: A tower on a promontory with windows on every wall and one window in the floor. The chair inside faces the floor-window. The sea below is dark.

title: The Rusted Compass Rose
scene: A bronze compass rose set into a courtyard floor, its points worn smooth by centuries of feet. One point has been re-engraved recently, pointing toward the house.

title: The Paper Vault
scene: Rolled documents floor to ceiling in a circular room, each sealed with wax. The catalogues no longer match the contents and have not for a long time.

title: The Specimen Jars
scene: A shelf of glass jars containing preserved specimens, each labelled in faded ink. The middle jar has been empty since before anyone can remember but the label is fresh.

title: The Echoing Hall
scene: A hall so resonant that words spoken in it repeat themselves, each echo slightly different from the last, as if something is responding from inside the walls.

title: The Oil-Dark Lake
scene: A lake that reflects no sky, only darkness. Its surface is completely still regardless of the weather. The sound of oars on it carries for three miles.

title: The Cartography Studio
scene: Maps cover every wall and the floor, overlapping and contradicting. In the centre of the room, a map is being drawn of this room, showing someone standing in it.

title: The Last Candle
scene: A single candle burning on a window ledge of an empty house, visible from the road. It has been burning for seven years and shows no sign of ending.

title: The Glass Floor
scene: A ballroom with a glass floor revealing the room below: identical to this one, furnished, lit, but with no access, no people, and a fireplace burning in a room with no chimney.

title: The Anatomist's Library
scene: Medical texts, anatomical drawings, and a human skeleton seated at a reading desk, a book open before it. The page is marked with a red ribbon tied in a surgeon's knot.

title: The Tide Garden
scene: A rock garden arranged in patterns that only become visible from above, filled twice daily by the sea. The rocks are engraved but only readable when submerged.

title: The Penumbra Room
scene: A room where the sun casts no shadows. Everything is uniformly lit from every direction simultaneously. The inhabitants cast shadows that belong to a different hour.

title: The Rope Bridge in Winter
scene: A rope bridge across a frozen gorge. Ice has formed on the ropes from the inside out. Footprints in the snow go to the middle and stop.

title: The Portrait Collection
scene: A warehouse storing hundreds of portraits face-to-face, leaning against each other. One at the end faces outward. Its subject looks back at whoever enters.

title: The Ticking Void
scene: A room with no furniture, no windows, no apparent light source. Only the sound of ticking from behind the walls, counting down to something that has not arrived yet.
